rationale: The raw signals show extremely broad, generic search and autocomplete volume ("crested gecko care," "diet," "enclosure") but very little forum/breeder community discussion or evidence of confusion. Google Trends shows a spike in "crested gecko morph chart" (+300%) and rising interest in specific morphs (black, halloween), but no Reddit threads or breeder blogs to ground misconceptions. YouTube has substantial coverage of morph guides and cappuccino genetics already. The Bluesky engagement is mostly pet-keeper and fan content, not breeder-specific. The signal pattern suggests buyer demand (morphs, prices, care) rather than breeding community discord. I'm rejecting all three potential topics because none meet the bar: no forum confusion threads, no publishable angles beyond what's already covered, and weak breeder-community engagement.
